evidence.content_preview: SnD: QML + SR/RS Flip + Fakeout patterns

raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The overall HTF trend is strongly BULLISH across MN1, W1, D1, H12, H8, and H6. The MTF trend is BEARISH, representing a healthy counter-trend pullback into a major HTF Demand Zone. Price has tapped the H4/H6 Demand Zone at 1.97082 and swept sell-side liquidity (SSL) by 14.7 pips. We have a high-quality SnD candidate EURNZD_QMH_BASELINE_BULLISH_1.9708 (QMH_BASELINE+RS_FLIP+FAKEOUT+MARUBOZU) at this level. The entry is set at 1.97082 with a structural SL at 1.96757 (below the H4 swing low). Targets are set at structural liquidity pools: TP1 at 1.97732 (M15 swing high), TP2 at 1.98057 (H1 swing high), and TP3 at 1.98888 (H4 FVG / unmitigated OB). This offers an average R:R of 3.36R, making it a highly favorable trade.

htf_bias.notes: MN1, W1, D1, H12, H8, and H6 are all strongly bullish, establishing a dominant upward institutional trend.

mtf_bias.notes: H4, H3, H1, M30, and M15 are bearish, representing a deep counter-trend pullback into a major HTF demand zone.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup

stop_loss.reason: Placed below the H4 swing low and the lower bound of the H4 demand zone with a 3-pip offset to avoid stop hunts.

take_profits.basis: H1 swing high / candidate take profit
